mapper.select: select userid, null as userpw, username, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(updatedate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as updatedate, enabled from cotdl.tbl_member where userid != 'admin' order by regdate desc
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_member (userid, userpw, username, regdate, updatedate, enabled) values (#{userid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userpw, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{enabled, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into COTDL.tbl_member (userid, userpw, username, regdate, updatedate, enabled) values (#{userid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userpw, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{enabled, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select userid, userpw, username, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(updatedate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as updatedate, enabled from cotdl.tbl_member where userid= #{userid}
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_member where userid= #{userid} and userid != 'admin'
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_member set userpw= #{userpw, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, username= #{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, regdate= to_date(#{regdate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'), updatedate= to_date(#{updatedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'), enabled= #{enabled, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where userid= #{userid} and userid != 'admin'

update cotdl.tbl_member set username= #{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, regdate= to_date(#{regdate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'), updatedate= to_date(#{updatedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'), enabled= #{enabled, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where userid= #{userid} and userid != 'admin'
mapper.select: select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_member where userid != 'admin'
